title: ranunculus bulbosus var. adscendens
intro: Ranunculus bulbosus var. adscendens, also known as the buttercup, is a perennial plant belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus bulbosus var. adscendens include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has also been used in homeopathic remedies.
